name: MCPilot
description: MCPilot is an AI chatbot that integrates real-time tools like DuckDuckGo, Airbnb, and weather APIs. Built with MCP Servers, Gradio, and GROQ, it provides context-aware responses and smooth interactions. Currently in beta, MCPilot aims to assist with real-time queries and tasks.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
